namespaces.zpl:
Define IPEndpoint as an endpoint with ip_addr.
Declare ip_0_0_0_0_0 as an IPEndpoint with ip_addr:'0.0.0.0/0'.
Declare ip_10_0_0_0_16 as an IPEndpoint with ip_addr:'10.0.0.0/16'.

Define ABC-web-servers.app1 as an endpoint.
Define App.App1 as an endpoint.
Define DB-Server.App1 as an endpoint.
Define DB-client.App1 as an endpoint.
Define DB-client.app1 as an endpoint.
Define XYZ-NLB.NLB1 as an endpoint.
Define app.dbs as an endpoint.
Define app.frontend as an endpoint.
Define app.store as an endpoint.
Define app.web as an endpoint.
Define applications.app.webserver as an endpoint.
Define apps.app1 as an endpoint.
Define apps.backend as an endpoint.
Define apps.frontend as an endpoint.
Define apps.hr-app-data as an endpoint.
Define apps.hr-apps as an endpoint.
Define compute.instance1 as an endpoint.
Define compute.instance2 as an endpoint.
Define data.sensitive as an endpoint.
Define database.database.MySQL as an endpoint.
Define database.server as an endpoint.
Define db.DB-Server as an endpoint.
Define hosts.trusted as an endpoint.
Define loadbalancer.web as an endpoint.
Define networks.net1.App1 as an endpoint.
Define osn-services-ip-addresses as an endpoint.
Define redis.cluster1 as an endpoint.
Define svc.dbs as an endpoint.
Declare ABC-web-servers.app1 as a ABC-web-servers.app1.
Declare App.App1 as a App.App1.
Declare DB-Server.App1 as a DB-Server.App1.
Declare DB-client.App1 as a DB-client.App1.
Declare DB-client.app1 as a DB-client.app1.
Declare XYZ-NLB.NLB1 as a XYZ-NLB.NLB1.
Declare app.dbs as a app.dbs.
Declare app.frontend as a app.frontend.
Declare app.store as a app.store.
Declare app.web as a app.web.
Declare applications.app.webserver as a applications.app.webserver.
Declare apps.app1 as a apps.app1.
Declare apps.backend as a apps.backend.
Declare apps.frontend as a apps.frontend.
Declare apps.hr-app-data as a apps.hr-app-data.
Declare apps.hr-apps as a apps.hr-apps.
Declare compute.instance1 as a compute.instance1.
Declare compute.instance2 as a compute.instance2.
Declare data.sensitive as a data.sensitive.
Declare database.database.MySQL as a database.database.MySQL.
Declare database.server as a database.server.
Declare db.DB-Server as a db.DB-Server.
Declare hosts.trusted as a hosts.trusted.
Declare loadbalancer.web as a loadbalancer.web.
Declare networks.net1.App1 as a networks.net1.App1.
Declare osn-services-ip-addresses as a osn-services-ip-addresses.
Declare redis.cluster1 as a redis.cluster1.
Declare svc.dbs as a svc.dbs.

Allow applications.app.webserver to access database.database.MySQL.
Allow app.dbs to access svc.dbs with protocol:'tcp/443'.
Allow App.App1 to access DB-Server.App1 with protocol:'tcp/999-11199'.

Allow db.DB-Server to access osn-services-ip-addresses.
Allow App.App1 to access DB-Server.App1 with protocol:'tcp/999-11199'.
Allow DB-client.App1 to access DB-client.app1 with protocol:'tcp/1521'.

Allow IPEndpoint with ip_addr:'0.0.0.0/0' to access XYZ-NLB.NLB1.
Allow XYZ-NLB.NLB1 to access ABC-web-servers.app1.
Allow compute.instance1 to access redis.cluster1.

Allow apps.frontend to access apps.backend.
Allow IPEndpoint with ip_addr:'10.0.0.0/16' to access apps.app1.
Allow app.frontend to access database.server with protocol:'tcp/1521', connection-state:'stateless'.

Allow compute.instance1 to access compute.instance2 with protocol:'tcp/22'.
Allow compute.instance1 to access compute.instance2 with protocol:'tcp/22'.
Allow compute.instance1 to access db.DB-Server with protocol:'tcp/1521'.
Allow networks.net1.App1 to access DB-Server.App1.
Allow loadbalancer.web to access IPEndpoint with ip_addr:'0.0.0.0/0'.
Allow app.frontend to access database.server with protocol:'tcp/1521', connection-state:'stateless'.
